errors.title: Error
errors.loading_presets: Failed to load presets. Please refresh the page.
errors.no_presets_message: No built-in presets are available. Please check your configuration.
errors.incompatible_light_message: One or more selected lights are not supported Aqara models. Please select only T1M, T1 Strip, or T2 bulb lights.

target.override_control_mode_hint: Pause all stops all adaptation. Pause changed only pauses the attribute you changed, allowing the other to keep adapting.
target.bare_turn_on_only_hint: When enabled, turning on a light with specific brightness or color overrides those attributes instead of applying solar values.
target.detect_non_ha_changes_hint: Detect changes made outside Home Assistant (manufacturer app, physical dimmer) by comparing entity state against last-applied values.
target.no_lights_message: Please select one or more lights to view available presets
target.include_all_lights_hint: Show all light entities, not just Aqara devices. CCT sequences and dynamic scenes work with any light.
target.favorites_empty: Save your first favorite for quick access

presets.manage_description_with_selection: Click a preset to activate it, or use the edit/delete buttons.
presets.no_presets_description: Use the other tabs to create and save your custom presets.

dialogs.create_effect_description: Create custom dynamic effect presets with your choice of colors, speed, and brightness.
dialogs.create_pattern_description: Design custom segment patterns by setting individual segment colors.
dialogs.create_cct_description: Build color temperature sequences with multiple steps and timing controls.
dialogs.create_segment_description: Design animated segment sequences with multiple steps and transition effects.
dialogs.create_scene_description: Create ambient lighting scenes with slow color transitions across multiple lights.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_effects: Preview not available, the selected light does not support dynamic effects. Compatible devices: T2 RGB bulb, T1M RGB endpoint, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_patterns: Preview not available, the selected light does not support segment patterns. Compatible devices: T1M RGB endpoint, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_cct: Preview not available, the selected light does not support CCT sequences. Compatible devices: T2 RGB bulb, T2 CCT bulb, T1M white endpoint, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_segments: Preview not available, the selected light does not support segment sequences. Compatible devices: T1M RGB endpoint, T1 Strip.
dialogs.compatibility_warning_scenes: Preview not available, the selected light does not support RGB colors. Compatible devices: T2 RGB bulb, T1M RGB endpoint, T1 Strip.

config.select_light_message: Select a light in the Activate tab to configure device-specific settings.
config.segment_zones_subtitle: Name segment ranges for quick selection and service calls
config.zone_empty_hint: Add a zone to group segments for easier selection in editors and service calls.
config.zone_segments_required: Select at least one segment for each zone.
config.zone_out_of_range: Zone "{name}": segment {segment} exceeds device maximum of {max}
config.zone_no_segment_devices: Segment zones are only available for devices that support segment addressing (T1M, T1 Strip).
config.entity_not_found: Entity not found for this device.
config.initial_brightness_not_found: Initial brightness entity not found for this device.
config.dimming_not_available: Dimming settings are not available for this device.
config.strip_length_info: Each meter has 5 addressable RGB segments (20cm each).
config.strip_length_not_found: Length entity not found for this device.
config.generic_lights_subtitle: Non-Aqara lights used in scenes and sequences
config.software_transitions_description: Use the integration's cubic-easing transition engine instead of the light's hardware transitions. Enable this if you notice jerky transitions on specific lights.
config.no_generic_lights: No generic lights have been used in scenes yet.

instances.no_instances: No Zigbee instances found. Make sure the integration is properly configured.

transition_curve.title: Transition curve
transition_curve.subtitle: Drag on the graph to adjust

tooltips.version_mismatch: Version mismatch detected: Backend (v{backend}) and frontend (v{frontend}) versions differ. Please refresh the page or restart Home Assistant to resolve this issue.
tooltips.setup_in_progress: The integration is still initializing. Device discovery is in progress and some features may not work correctly until setup completes.

editors.icon_auto_hint: Auto-generated from colors when not set
editors.no_steps_message: No steps defined. Click "Add step" to create your first step.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_effects: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview effects on your devices.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_patterns: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview patterns on your devices.
editors.select_lights_for_preview_sequences: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview sequences on your devices.
editors.expand_blocks_label: Expand blocks to fill segments evenly
editors.gradient_mode_description: Create a smooth color gradient. Add 2-6 colors to blend.
editors.blocks_mode_description: Create evenly spaced blocks of color. Add 1-6 colors.
editors.gradient_min_colors_error: Gradient mode requires at least 2 colors. Please add more colors to steps using gradient mode or change the mode.
editors.tooltip_select_lights_first: Select entities in Activate tab first
editors.tooltip_light_no_cct: Selected light does not support color temperature
editors.incompatible_cct_endpoints: One or more selected lights do not support color temperature control. CCT sequences require lights with color_temp capability. For T1M devices, select the white/CCT endpoint instead of the RGB ring endpoint.
editors.adaptive_mode_hint: Schedule and solar modes automatically adjust color temperature and brightness throughout the day.
editors.auto_resume_delay_hint: Seconds before automatically resuming after manual override (0 = manual only)

dynamic_scene.select_lights_for_preview: Select light entities in the Activate tab to preview dynamic scenes on your devices.

image_extractor.drop_hint: Click or drop an image here
